'''Gharakh''' was one of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo's]] numerous [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] bodyguards. He accompanied Organa Solo to a meeting with [[Shada D'ukal]] at the [[Orowood Tower]] during the [[Caamas Document Crisis|Caamas Incident]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
